scripts.sync:frontend: npm run build:rueckenwind && npm run update:mergely
scripts.test:php:setup: docker compose -f docker-compose.typemill.yml exec typemill sh -c 'curl -sSL https://phar.phpunit.de/phpunit-11.phar -o /var/www/html/tests/php/phpunit.phar && chmod +x /var/www/html/tests/php/phpunit.phar && echo "PHPUnit phar installed."'
scripts.test:php: docker compose -f docker-compose.typemill.yml exec typemill sh -c 'php /var/www/html/tests/php/phpunit.phar --configuration /var/www/html/tests/php/phpunit.xml'
scripts.test: npm run test:php:local && npm run test:api
